mapper.select: SELECT l.lesson_id, l.node_id, s.subject_name, c.title AS curriculum_title, l.title AS lesson_title, l.required_for_completion, COUNT(p.problem_id) AS problem_count, l.content, c.level_code, l.sort_order, l.created_at, l.updated_at, l.is_active FROM lessons l JOIN curriculum_nodes c ON l.node_id = c.node_id JOIN subjects s ON c.subject_id = s.subject_id LEFT JOIN practice_problems p ON p.lesson_id = l.lesson_id GROUP BY l.lesson_id, l.node_id, s.subject_name, c.title, l.title, l.required_for_completion, l.content, c.level_code, l.sort_order, l.created_at, l.updated_at, l.is_active ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC, s.subject_id ASC, CASE c.level_code WHEN 'BRONZE' THEN 1 WHEN 'SILVER' THEN 2 WHEN 'GOLD' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, c.sort_order ASC, l.sort_order ASC, l.lesson_id ASC

SELECT l.lesson_id, l.node_id, s.subject_name, c.title AS curriculum_title, l.title AS lesson_title, l.required_for_completion, COUNT(p.problem_id) AS problem_count, l.content, c.level_code, l.sort_order, l.created_at, l.updated_at, l.is_active FROM lessons l JOIN curriculum_nodes c ON l.node_id = c.node_id JOIN subjects s ON c.subject_id = s.subject_id LEFT JOIN practice_problems p ON p.lesson_id = l.lesson_id
GROUP BY l.lesson_id, l.node_id, s.subject_name, c.title, l.title, l.required_for_completion, l.content, c.level_code, l.sort_order, l.created_at, l.updated_at, l.is_active ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC, s.subject_id ASC, CASE c.level_code WHEN 'BRONZE' THEN 1 WHEN 'SILVER' THEN 2 WHEN 'GOLD' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, c.sort_order ASC, l.sort_order ASC, l.lesson_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lessons l JOIN curriculum_nodes c ON l.node_id = c.node_id JOIN subjects s ON c.subject_id = s.subject_id
